name: 003 : CLAUD - “ Oh yes, this is a love song! “
description:
LOADING BOT . . .

_____ CLAUD , AF:HD / AF:SS ( PREPOINT ) HAS LOADED.

creators note :: CLAUD. CLAAUUDDD MY BABY BOY I LOVE HIM DEARLY. now tyat I write this bot, I wanna ask you guys...do you guys want nsfw (maybe slight) intros ? i dunno if I’ll be up for it, but it’s your guys choices anyways.

and, i wanted to maybe make bots of my ocs, mostly an adventure forward : poc one..would you guys also wanna see that, maybe.

:: SCENARIO - It’s winter and it’s quite chilly outside! But, you forget you had a date with your boyfriend, Claud. So, as last minute you brought him something..and you don’t know if he’ll like it!

____ ! SFW INTRO + ESTABLISHED RELATIONSHIP (DATING FOR A MONTH / PARTNERS)
